mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue support for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 7.0% and is rising, labor-market stress lowers expected consumption and earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than untriggered observations or if positive returns occur in more than 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A near-zero federal funds rate combined with decelerating CPI inflation lowers real discount-rate pressure and supports equity valuation expansion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.25% and 3-month CPIAUCSL inflation change below its prior 3-month change
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-rate and CPI-deceleration trigger produces non-positive average 60-day S&P 500 returns or underperforms periods with FEDFUNDS above 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: A downward break in industrial production signals weakening real activity and margin pressure for cyclical companies, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside breaks are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts crossing above 800 thousand units signals improving construction activity and household balance-sheet confidence, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST crossings above 800 are followed by negative average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if hit rate for positive returns is below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion together with a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor-income growth without slack deterioration, raising expected revenues and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down trigger has lower average 20-day S&P 500 returns than either single condition alone or if Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above 4.5% signals restrictive monetary policy that raises discount rates and tightens credit conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS crossings above 4.5% are followed by positive average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if returns are not lower than during FEDFUNDS below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong lagged GDP combined with falling retail sales signals a transition from reported growth to current demand weakness, causing near-term earnings disappointment and negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 rises over the latest quarter and RSAFS falls over the latest month
failure_condition: Reject if the GDP-up and RSAFS-down trigger is followed by non-negative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if the negative hit rate is below 55% in walk-forward tests.
